# chalk_environment_background_persistence_deployment_binding (Resource)

Manages a binding between a Chalk environment and a background persistence deployment.

**Required permissions:** `project.create`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `background_persistence_deployment_id` (String) The ID of the background persistence deployment to bind to the environment.
- `environment_id` (String) The ID of the environment to bind to the background persistence deployment.
